title: Remote and Hybrid Work Policy: Eligibility and Expectations
text:
Q: What are the eligibility criteria and expectations for remote and hybrid work?
A: Employees are eligible for remote or hybrid work arrangements if they have completed at least six months of continuous employment and have demonstrated satisfactory performance in their role. To apply for a remote or hybrid work arrangement, employees should submit a request to their direct supervisor using the Remote Work Request Form available on the HR portal. Requests should be submitted at least two weeks prior to the desired start date. Expectations for remote and hybrid work include maintaining regular communication with team members, attending all scheduled meetings, and meeting project deadlines. Employees must also be available during core business hours, which are from 9 AM to 5 PM. For any questions or further clarification, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
